title: Natural Shilajit vs Pure Himalayan Shilajit: Full Brand Comparison (2026)
description: Natural Shilajit (UNESCO Altai, DBP-verified) and Pure Himalayan Shilajit (Himalayan source, ISO/IEC 17025 tested) are two of the most transparent shilajit brands available. Here's an honest head-to-head covering sourcing, testing, forms, price, and who each brand suits best.
